message:
feat(doctor): add tmux observe mode for app smoke fallback

Introduces ObserveMode enum and --observe/--tmux-session-name/--tmux-keep-open
CLI args so doctor can launch the app smoke test inside a tmux session,
stream pane output to a log, and optionally keep the session alive after
the timeout for interactive debugging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
